item.title: Twenty-Four Cents to Write an Article—My Experience Replacing Codex with Pi + DeepSeek
item.author: xianpeng.shen@gmail.com (Xianpeng Shen)
item.description: Codex’s $22 monthly subscription fee and usage limits prompted me to seek alternatives. After a failed attempt with OpenCode, I turned to the Pi + DeepSeek combination—the results were surprisingly good, costing only 0.24 RMB to write an entire blog post.
